tools.name: JSON Formatter
tools.description: Format, validate, and minify JSON. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: Word & Character Counter
tools.description: Count words and characters with multi-section support. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: JSON Diff Tool
tools.description: Compare two JSON documents with Git-like diff visualization. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: Subnet Calculator
tools.description: Visual subnet division and joining for IP address planning. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.description: Generate placeholder text by words, characters, sentences, or paragraphs. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: JWT Decoder
tools.description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: URL Decoder
tools.description: Decode and deconstruct URLs into protocol, domain, path, query parameters, and more. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: Diagram Visualiser
tools.description: Render Graphviz DOT diagrams live with export to SVG and PNG. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: Mermaid Diagram Visualiser
tools.description: Render Mermaid diagrams live with export to SVG and PNG. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: JSON to YAML
tools.description: Convert JSON to YAML in block, flow, and quoted styles. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: YAML to JSON
tools.description: Convert YAML to JSON with pretty or compact output. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
tools.description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: DNS Lookup
tools.description: Look up DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, and more) via Cloudflare DNS-over-HTTPS. Shareable via URL.

tools.name: Color Picker
tools.description: Pick colors visually, convert between hex, RGB, and HSL, and sample any color on screen with the eyedropper. Shareable via URL.
